title: Pay review body members' fees and expenses from 2024 to 2025
body: "These figures show the fees and expenses claimed by members of:    Armed Forces’ Pay Review Body - GOV.UK (AFPRB)  Review Body on Doctors’ and Dentists’ Remuneration - GOV.UK (DDRB)  NHS Pay Review Body - GOV.UK (NHSPRB)  Prison Service Pay Review Body - GOV.UK (PSPRB)  School Teachers’ Review Body - GOV.UK (STRB)  Senior Salaries Review Body - GOV.UK (SSRB)  National Crime Agency Remuneration Review Body - GOV.UK (NCARRB)  Police Remuneration Review Body - GOV.UK (PRRB)  "
